skills.methodologyLabel: Retrieval Methodology — how the subject processes evidence

major.title: Fighter Jet Detection using CNN and Transfer Learning
major.visualAria: Confusion matrix: TP 94, FP 6, FN 4, TN 96
major.description: Convolutional neural network trained on aerial imagery achieving 94% detection accuracy across varied lighting and angles. Model quantization and batch optimization reduced inference time. Preprocessing pipeline to reduce noise. Published and presented at IEEE ICSCC 2023.

major.title: AIReviewHub — Code Review Automation Platform
major.description: AI-powered code review system analyzing 1,000+ code snippets using CodeBERT embeddings and static analysis. Generates automated suggestions for code complexity, security vulnerabilities, and maintainability. Features an explainable AI layer with confidence scoring and reasoning traces.

major.title: E-Commerce Big Data Analytics Platform
major.description: Distributed ETL pipeline ingesting 3 CSV datasets into PostgreSQL, processing 14,000+ records with PySpark. K-Means customer segmentation with 92% clustering coherence. Exponential smoothing time-series forecasting. 7 REST APIs and a React dashboard for real-time business intelligence.

major.title: Task Manager — Full-Stack Web Application
major.visualAria: Architecture flow: User Auth → CRUD Tasks → AI Schedule
major.description: Multi-user task management platform with full CRUD operations, Google OAuth SSO, session-based authentication, and role-based admin portal. Integrated OpenAI GPT-4o-mini to generate AI-powered daily schedules based on user role and goals.

major.title: Paperly — Collaborative Document Editor
major.visualAria: Architecture: Clerk Auth → Tiptap Editor → Liveblocks real-time sync
major.description: Real-time collaborative document editor with live multi-user cursor presence powered by Liveblocks and a reactive Convex backend. Rich text editing via Tiptap with 18+ extensions including tables, images, mentions, task lists, and colour themes. Clerk handles authentication.

major.title: On-Chain Voting DApp
major.visualAria: On-chain vote flow: Genesis → Vote 1 → Vote 2 → Tally
major.description: Decentralized voting application on Ethereum with multi-hop vote delegation, loop prevention, and chairperson-controlled election lifecycle. Deployed to Sepolia testnet. Frontend communicates directly with blockchain via MetaMask wallet.

minor.title: A* Pathfinding Visualizer
minor.description: Algorithm visualization with animated grid showing A* pathfinding in real-time.

profile.bio: IEEE-published CNN research. Production FastAPI / PyTorch systems. 14K-record PySpark pipelines. Currently building retrieval-augmented generation systems with LangChain, LlamaIndex & LangGraph. MS Computer Science, Cal State Fullerton — seeking full-time AI/ML engineering roles.

philosophy.body: Every system I build begins with exploratory analysis — understanding distributions, finding anomalies, and letting the data reveal its structure before writing a single model. Whether it is 14,000 e-commerce records or aerial jet imagery, the data always has something to say first.
philosophy.title: “I start with the data”

philosophy.body: Black-box ML has limited production value. In AIReviewHub I built a confidence scoring and reasoning trace layer so developers could trust and verify every suggestion. Explainability is not a feature — it is the foundation of adoption.
philosophy.title: “I ship explainable systems”

philosophy.body: My IEEE-published CNN research did not stop at 94% accuracy on paper. I applied the same transfer learning and preprocessing principles to build deployable, optimized systems. Research only matters when it runs in production.
philosophy.title: “I bridge research and product”

extras.text: Everything he built is logged below — proceed to the Exhibits ↓

bullets: Reduced recurring API errors by 30% by debugging Python backend services, refactoring SQL queries, and implementing validation layers
Accelerated feature delivery by 20% by collaborating in Agile sprints, translating requirements into REST endpoints, and participating in code reviews
Increased maintainability of legacy modules by writing unit tests and restructuring tightly coupled components, reducing post-release incidents
Resolved critical production issues within SLA through root-cause analysis using application logs and version control history
Maintained reliable on-call availability and consistently met scheduling commitments in a high-accountability, safety-critical environment
Communicated clearly with a diverse campus population — students, faculty, and staff — under time pressure and in stressful situations
Followed strict institutional protocols (emergency radio codes, incident documentation, escalation procedures) with zero margin for error
